summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of BaseLayer landing page. All core functionality working correctly including navigation, FAQ accordion, Calendly embed, and mobile responsiveness.

design_issues.issue: Hero section selector #hero not found, but section renders correctly
Mobile CTA button data-testid not found in mobile menu

passed_tests: Page loads with all sections (Navbar, Problem, Solution, How It Works, FAQ, CTA, Footer)
Navigation links scroll to correct sections (problem, solution, how-it-works, faq)
Book a demo buttons scroll to CTA section (navbar and hero buttons)
FAQ accordion items expand/collapse correctly (all 8 items tested)
Calendly iframe embedded correctly in CTA section with proper URL
Mobile responsive design works (mobile menu toggles, layout adapts)
Most data-testid attributes present on interactive elements
Navbar glassmorphic effect works on scroll
All CTA buttons are clickable and functional
